display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（动态点菜 QR＋全链路诊断测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: replaces the 360-node Quick Replies ordering tree with RabbitMirror Menu QR v2.1, a seven-node dynamic STscript menu containing all 101 thematic elements and 177 presentation formats. Retains custom ordering, one-use pending order semantics, local static download, SVG data-URI body-preservation rescue, data-active group-state rescue, full-chain diagnostic, source recovery, thinking isolation, readability safeguards, dark-background cooldown, and all existing rescue routes. The QR asset is never injected into model context.
